context: We got a sausage and rice cake skewer which I've never tried before but I know it's super popular at rest stops in Korea so I'm pretty excited to try it out. I also got potatoes. This is my favorite dish at the rest stop. It never disappoints me. I love rice cakes because their texture is so unique. It's so squishy. I love it. I love how these potatoes are a little bit crispy on the outside but soft on the inside and lightly salted but I know it's untraditional but I always have to have ketchup with these potatoes. This is for sure without a doubt my go-to snack at the rest stop. We've got our leftover food some ice coffee and now it's time to hit the road because I want to check in early so we can fully enjoy the hotel.
